claim: Agent drives a date-range picker end-to-end, binding values and formatting output without reaching for a third-party calendar.
prompt: Build a BookingRange.svelte that lets the user pick check-in and check-out dates using DryUI's DateRangePicker. Disable past dates. Show the duration in nights below the picker. Use bindable props, not manual state plumbing.

acceptance_checks.description: No errors; uses `bind:value` not manual plumbing.
DateRangePicker compound is used, not hand-rolled Calendar.
